summary: Phase 3 testing complete. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including reduced 'ji' usage in AI responses, custom demo bar, and Emergent badge hidden.
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 complete. All features tested: Reduced 'ji' overuse in AI responses (0 'ji' in test responses), TTS endpoint working (200 with audio), Custom demo bar visible with input and Try Now button, Reset to Desi Road button works, Emergent badge hidden via CSS, Chat interaction end-to-end working.

AI responses are natural: 'Perfect! One Butter Chicken Cone coming up. Anything else with that?' ✓
Order panel detects items from chat ✓
